description: Create evidence timeline showing the history of AGK ceramide kinase claims and refutations
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 10))
ax.set_title("Evidence Timeline: AGK Ceramide Kinase Activity Hypothesis", 
             fontweight='bold', fontsize=13)

# Timeline data
events = [
    (2004, "Waggoner et al.\nPMID:15252046", 
     "MuLK/AGK phosphorylates ceramide in vitro\n(but higher Vmax for DAG → 'primarily a DAG kinase')", 
     "weakly_supports", "top"),
    (2005, "Bektas et al.\nPMID:15939762", 
     "AGK characterized: phosphorylates MAG→LPA, DAG→PA\nNO mention of ceramide kinase activity", 
     "refutes", "bottom"),
    (2006, "Van Overloop et al.\nPMID:16269826", 
     "'No evidence for phosphorylation of ceramide\nby the recently described multiple lipid kinase'", 
     "refutes", "top"),
    (2007, "Epand et al.\nPMID:18004883", 
     "MuLK is 'least selective' among DGKs\nStudied stereospecificity for DAG only", 
     "neutral", "bottom"),
    (2009, "Kalari et al.\nPMID:19112101", 
     "AGK role in LPA signaling\nNo ceramide activity mentioned", 
     "refutes", "top"),
    (2017, "Kang/Vukotic et al.\nPMID:28712726/24", 
     "AGK is TIM22 complex subunit\nKinase-independent function for protein import\nLipid kinase: MAG→LPA, DAG→PA", 
     "refutes", "bottom"),
    (2021, "Chu et al.\nPMID:34368119", 
     "AGK review: 'mitochondrial lipid kinase'\nInvolved in lipid metabolism, not ceramide", 
     "refutes", "top"),
    (2023, "Zhang et al.\nPMID:37051931", 
     "AGK in platelets: tested for PA/LPA\nNo ceramide activity tested/claimed", 
     "refutes", "bottom"),
    (2026, "Multiple papers\n(various PMIDs)", 
     "AGK in cancer/mitochondria\nConsistently described as acylglycerol kinase", 
     "refutes", "top"),
]

colors = {
    'weakly_supports': '#FF9800',
    'refutes': '#F44336',
    'neutral': '#9E9E9E',
    'supports': '#4CAF50'
}

ax.axhline(y=0, color='black', linewidth=2, zorder=1)
years = [e[0] for e in events]
ax.set_xlim(2002, 2028)
ax.set_ylim(-6, 6)

for i, (year, ref, desc, evidence_type, position) in enumerate(events):
    color = colors[evidence_type]
    y_offset = 2.5 if position == "top" else -2.5
    
    # Stem
    ax.plot([year, year], [0, y_offset * 0.4], color=color, linewidth=2, zorder=2)
    
    # Box
    bbox_props = dict(boxstyle="round,pad=0.4", facecolor=color, alpha=0.15, 
                      edgecolor=color, linewidth=2)
    
    y_text = y_offset * 1.0
    ax.text(year, y_text, f"{ref}\n\n{desc}", ha='center', va='center',
            fontsize=7, bbox=bbox_props, zorder=3,
            linespacing=1.3)
    
    # Dot on timeline
    ax.plot(year, 0, 'o', color=color, markersize=10, zorder=4, markeredgecolor='black')

# Legend
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FF9800', label='Weakly supports (in vitro only)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#F44336', label='Refutes / contradicts'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#9E9E9E', label='Neutral / tangential'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_patches, fontsize=10, loc='lower right', 
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.98, 0.02))

ax.set_xlabel('Year', fontsize=11)
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# Add verdict
ax.text(0.5, 0.97, "VERDICT: Over-annotated — Only 1 in vitro report (2004), contradicted by replication failure (2006),\n"
        "and >20 years of literature describing AGK exclusively as acylglycerol kinase",
        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFCDD2', alpha=0.9, edgecolor='#F44336'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('agk_evidence_timeline.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Timeline saved.")
